app.title: EsperantAI
app.subtitle: Universal AI gesture controller for streamers

triggers.universal_desc: same meaning in any culture (Ekman 1972 — basic emotions, head rotation, gaze)
triggers.cultural_desc: meaning may vary by country/culture (hand gestures)
triggers.connect_first_hint: Real scenes will appear in dropdowns automatically once connected.

advanced.use_preview: Use Preview + Transition in Studio Mode
advanced.studio_mode_hint: If unchecked, scene switches directly to Program. If checked, sets Preview first then triggers the OBS configured transition.
advanced.save_password: Remember OBS password (careful on shared computers!)
advanced.persistence_hint: All settings are automatically saved to localStorage.
advanced.kbd_r: Reload scene list from streaming app

errors.camera_denied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera in browser settings.
errors.obs_unreachable: Cannot connect to OBS. Check that OBS is running and WebSocket is enabled (Tools → WebSocket Server Settings).
errors.file_protocol_warning: Running from file://. Cameras may not appear. Use the launcher script with Python, or run 'npx serve .'
errors.human_load_error: Could not load the AI model. Check your internet connection and reload.
errors.reset_confirm: Delete ALL settings and reset to defaults?

hints.scene_mapping_hint: Select the OBS scene that activates with each gesture. Connect to OBS first so real scenes appear.
hints.head_priority_hint: Head rotation has highest priority. If your head moves, gaze and distance are ignored.
hints.gaze_hint: Only activates when your head is centered. If head also moves, head wins.
hints.distance_hint: Measures how close your face is. Only triggers when head is centered.
hints.emotion_hint: Emotion must be stable with high confidence. 2-second cooldown between emotion changes.
hints.blink_hint: Double blink = close both eyes quickly twice (within 700ms). 1-second cooldown.
hints.hand_hint: Hand gestures detection. Detected gestures: thumbs up, peace, rock, OK, fist, open palm, point.
hints.platform_hint: Connect to streaming platforms to trigger actions on events: donations, subs, raids, channel points.

diagnostic.silent_mode_on: Silent mode active. Logging only events and errors.
diagnostic.verbose_mode_on: Verbose mode active: {frames} frames without face.
